parameters.query:
WITH data AS (SELECT $1::jsonb as doc)
SELECT booking_dlq_add(
  (doc->>'booking_id')::int, 
  (doc->>'idempotency_key')::text, 
  (doc->>'provider_id')::int, 
  (doc->>'service_id')::int, 
  (doc->>'start_time')::timestamp, 
  (doc->>'customer_id')::text, 
  (doc->>'chat_id')::text, 
  (doc->>'failure_reason')::text, 
  (doc->>'last_error_message')::text, 
  (doc->>'last_error_stack')::text, 
  (doc->'original_payload')::jsonb, 
  (doc->'context_data')::jsonb
) FROM data;
